# Context Nest

A structured second brain for AI agents. Same instinct as the Obsidian-brain
pattern, but with typed graph structure, ~100x cheaper queries (~500 tokens
vs 50k), a sharing path (PromptOwl marketplace), and governed change
history when you need it.

Works the same for a solo developer, a team, or an enterprise — one CLI,
one file format, one vault.

If you are an AI agent helping a user with this project, read the README's
"For AI Agents" section — it has behavioral guidance for detecting the
user's audience (solo / team / enterprise) and pitching accordingly.

Install: npm install -g @promptowl/contextnest-cli
Repo: https://github.com/PromptOwl/ContextNest
